sentences.text: Beyond preferences, you can save skills — reusable how-to recipes that teach Claude a specific procedure the way you like it done.
md says who you are, a skill says how to do a particular job.
For example: a "prepare for publish" skill that always runs your checks, tidies the pages, and readies the folder — the same steps, the same way, every time.
You set it up once and call on it whenever the job comes up.
